title: The sub SELECT can't identify the outer table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE C (x INT, y VARCHAR(20), z DATE);
INSERT INTO C (x, y, z) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO C (x, y, z) VALUES (2, NULL, '2023-02-01');
SELECT * FROM C WHERE C.x NOT IN (SELECT C2.x FROM C AS C2 WHERE C2.y IS NOT NULL AND C2.z < '2023-03-01');
key_bug_features: Sub SELECT fails to reference outer table correctly
